steps.title: Recognize the structure
steps.content: The blank needs a preposition (“from”) directly followed by its object (“the private collections of French aristocrats”).

steps.title: Apply the rule
steps.content: No punctuation can appear between a preposition and its object. Choices A, C, and D each place punctuation (semicolon, colon, or comma) between “from” and its object. That matches choice B — B is correct.
